_comment: TEMPORARY committed fallback so footage auto-tagging works without setting GROQ_API_KEYS in .env. Used ONLY when GROQ_API_KEYS / GROQ_API_KEY env is empty. Once the env var is set on the server, DELETE this file and ROTATE these keys (committed keys may be auto-revoked by GitHub/Groq secret scanning). Validated 200 against meta-llama/llama-4-scout-17b-16e-instruct on 2026-06-29.
